public.heroTitle: One workspace for schemes, documents, and citizen service workflows.
public.heroSubtitle: An intelligent access layer—not a brochure site—that connects people to programmes, documents, and desk workflows at national scale, with multilingual, accessible, and low-bandwidth-aware delivery.
public.trustLine: Clear status. Defensible trails. Privacy-aware defaults.
public.capSchemeDesc: Eligibility cues, document nudges, and application timelines aligned to national and state programmes—without inventing policy.
public.capSecureDesc: Citizens, students, organisations, staff, and administrators each see a surface shaped for their mandate—with activity you can explain.
public.capServiceDesc: Structured requests, officer queues, and timely updates so essential services keep moving when volume spikes.
public.footerTrust: Citizen One is designed as foundational infrastructure: it coordinates information and workflows while official issuers remain the source of truth for eligibility and benefits.
public.footerPrivacy: Privacy: use only official portals to submit sensitive documents. This workspace minimises data collection and supports regional language access.
public.dpiBody: The platform is architected to sit alongside existing government systems—supporting multiple departments, scalable regional deployment, and long-term operational sustainability with inclusive defaults.

voice.title: Voice assistance
voice.subtitle: Speak in your chosen interface language. Audio is processed in your browser when supported; enable the microphone only when you intend to use this feature.
voice.notSupported: Voice recognition is not supported in this browser. Use text navigation or update your browser.
voice.micDenied: Microphone permission was denied. You can continue using text and touch controls.
voice.unclear: We could not understand that. Please speak again or use the sidebar.
voice.privacyNote: Speech is processed locally where possible. Do not dictate passwords or full ID numbers.

sms.title: SMS interaction (pilot concept)
sms.lead: For citizens without reliable internet, a national deployment may offer a sanctioned SMS short code linked to the same account profile.
sms.bullet1: Send keywords such as SCHEMES, STATUS, or HELP to receive short programme summaries or application reminders.
sms.bullet2: Outbound alerts can confirm deadlines and service-desk updates when you opt in and verify your mobile number.
sms.bullet3: Keyword flows are defined by the operating authority; this interface documents the integration pattern only.
sms.profileNote: Link your verified mobile number in Profile when your jurisdiction enables SMS—permissions and workflows for staff and administrators are unchanged.

connectivity.title: Low-bandwidth & offline guidance
connectivity.liteHint: Reduces decorative blur, heavy shadows, and non-essential motion to improve performance on slow networks.
connectivity.offlineBody: Signing in, submitting applications, and syncing the service desk require a connection. Save or print scheme pages from your browser for later reading.
connectivity.savedLaterBody: Use your browser’s bookmark or “Save as PDF” on official guidance before travelling to low-connectivity areas.

accessibility.title: Easier interface (elderly & low vision)
accessibility.easyHint: Larger text, higher contrast, and clearer primary actions. Does not change your permissions.
accessibility.simplified: Reduced visual clutter in workspace chrome
accessibility.voiceOptional: Optional voice assistance remains available from the floating control when signed in.

inclusion.title: Inclusion & accessibility
inclusion.description: Language, voice, SMS concepts, and display modes for equitable access across roles.

offline.title: Connectivity
offline.description: Lightweight mode and offline expectations for essential services.

settings.title: Settings & accessibility
settings.description: Display, motion, and connectivity preferences for your workspace.

sms.title: SMS channel
sms.description: Concept and integration notes for text-based access.

navigator.title: Service pathways
navigator.description: Typical steps for using this workspace.

benefits.title: Benefit Discovery
benefits.description: Live scheme intelligence loads when you open this module.

assistant.title: Intelligent guidance
assistant.description: Interprets the situation signals you share, ranks programmes by fit and impact, and points to defensible next steps. Issuers remain authoritative; this layer organises access.

assistant.title: Intelligent guidance
assistant.subtitle: Situation signals, ranked programmes, next actions

navigator.title: Life Navigator
navigator.subtitle: Education, jobs, health, family, retirement pathways

benefits.title: Benefit Discovery
benefits.subtitle: Scheme eligibility, status tracking, and deadlines

vault.title: Identity Vault
vault.subtitle: Documents, access logs, and secure records

opportunities.title: Opportunity Engine
opportunities.subtitle: Jobs, grants, scholarships, and market links

landing.heroDeck: Citizen One is the calm surface where residents find programmes, submit what’s required, and follow honest status—while teams clear queues with tools that respect issuer sovereignty.
landing.heroBody: Citizen One is built for credible, government-style delivery: multilingual access, clear navigation, strong readability, and tools that help people find and apply for programmes—while giving staff a real queue for decisions.
landing.glanceAuth: Authenticated sessions with role-aware navigation (citizen, student, organisation, staff, admin).
landing.glanceBenefits: Benefit discovery with eligibility scoring, guidance panels, and application status in one place.
landing.glancePremium: Optional premium tools; core welfare discovery remains available on the free tier.
landing.capabilitiesHeading: One spine. Three audiences. Zero theatre.
landing.capabilitiesSub: The same backbone powers discovery for residents, throughput for officers, and traceability for oversight—opinionated where it must be, quiet everywhere else.
landing.footerDemo: Demonstration environment · Replace branding and copy with your jurisdiction's official standards.
landing.platformLead: A single account, many programmes, one understandable timeline—so residents stop guessing and teams stop reconciling spreadsheets.
landing.platformFeat1Desc: Residents read progress in plain language; auditors read the same events in structured history—no parallel narratives.
landing.platformFeat2Desc: Queues, assignments, and reminders are first-class—designed for SLAs and surge weeks, not slide decks.
landing.platformFeat3Desc: Documents and entitlements attach to the person, not to a PDF folder—still bounded by what issuers actually authorize.
landing.impactLead: Designed for measurable reliability: security defaults, inclusive UX, and desk throughput you can observe.
landing.trustRibbon: Designed for jurisdictions that answer to ministers—and to residents
landing.ctaBandBody: Create accounts, route real requests, and publish status with language, contrast, and motion defaults that already respect inclusion.
landing.featuresLead: Everything you need to coordinate programmes, documents, and citizen requests in one calm interface.
landing.footerBlurb: Citizen One is the disciplined front end for digital public services—credible enough for a white paper, usable enough for a Tuesday afternoon.
landing.replicaHeroDeck: Citizen One is the calm access layer for schemes, documents, and desk workflows—so residents find what they qualify for, file what’s required, and read honest status while teams clear queues with tools that respect issuer sovereignty.
landing.replicaVal1Desc: Profile-aware benefit discovery, eligibility signals, deadlines, and structured guidance—rule-based intelligence, not generic chat theatre.
landing.replicaVal2Desc: Role-faithful experiences for residents, students, organisations, staff, and administrators—with sessions, vault memory, and activity you can explain.
landing.replicaVal3Desc: Structured requests, queues, and clear updates so essential services keep moving when volume spikes—without parallel spreadsheets.
landing.replicaFeat1Desc: Residents see what’s happening with applications and requests; officers see the same story in operational form—no competing narratives.
landing.replicaFeat2Desc: Assignments, reminders, and service-desk queues are first-class—built for surge weeks and SLAs, not slideware.
landing.replicaFeat3Desc: Vault and cross-programme memory cut re-upload friction while staying bounded by what issuers actually authorize and verify.
landing.replicaCtaBody: Create an account, enrich your eligibility profile, and move between benefit discovery, the document vault, intelligent guidance, and the service desk—signed in once, oriented throughout.

workspace.unknownDesc: This section could not be loaded. Use the sidebar to open a valid workspace.

settingsWorkspace.preferencesBody: Account-level display and accessibility settings sync from this device. Open your profile for personal details.
settingsWorkspace.sessionNote: Session lifetime: up to {hours} hours. On shared devices, sign out from the header menu when finished.

common.footerSecureLine: Your sign-in is encrypted in transit. Never share passwords, backup codes, or one-time codes with anyone.
common.footerPrivacyLine: We use your details only to sign you in and keep your session. Retention and legal basis follow your organisation’s privacy notice.

resident.title: Resident or student
resident.description: Personal workspace: schemes, vault, and your service requests.

staff.title: Staff or officer
staff.description: Queues, reviews, and decisions on citizen-facing work.

organization.title: Organisation
organization.description: Partner visibility and co-ordination across programmes.

login.errorEmailPassword: Enter your email address and password.
login.mfaErrorShort: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
login.subMfa: Paste the one-time code from your authenticator app to finish signing in.
login.subSignIn: Use your work or personal email and password. After sign-in you’ll open the workspace that matches your account—resident, staff, organisation, or admin.
login.subRole: First, choose the portal your organisation assigned you. Then sign in with the email and password for that account.
login.subCredentials: Use the same email your organisation has on file. Your connection is encrypted; never share your password or verification codes.
login.footerHttps: Production should always use HTTPS. Do not share passwords, backup codes, or OTPs with anyone.
login.footerHelp: Help: use your organisation's published service desk or helpline.
login.footerPrivacy: We use credentials only to authenticate you and keep your session. See your organisation’s privacy notice for retention and lawful basis.
login.noticeIdle: You were signed out after a period of inactivity. Sign in again to continue.
login.noticeSession: Your session is no longer active. Sign in again to continue.
login.noticeVerified: Your email address has been verified. You may sign in below.
login.signInOptionHint: Must match how your account was issued.
login.rememberDevice: Stay signed in on this device (avoid on shared computers)
login.civiqVisualLead: Find programmes, store documents, and track requests in one workspace—for residents and the teams that serve them.

signup.heading: Create your workspace
signup.intro: For new residents, students, and partner organisations only.
signup.introStaff: Staff and administrators are provisioned by their organisation. If that’s you, use Sign in below—do not register here.
signup.visualLead: Discovery, document vault, and service desk together—so you and your organisation stay aligned.
signup.footerNote: By creating an account you agree to follow your organisation’s acceptable-use and privacy policies.
signup.remember: Stay signed in on this device (avoid on shared computers)

recovery.title: Account recovery
recovery.subtitle: Reset your password in a short sequence. For your security, we do not confirm whether an email address is registered.
recovery.step1Body: Enter the email address you use for Citizen One. If it matches our records, a verification code will be issued through your organisation's configured channel.
recovery.step2Fallback: Enter the verification code you received. In local development, the server may print a code to the terminal.
recovery.step3Body: Choose a strong password you have not used elsewhere.
recovery.step4Body: Your password has been updated. Sign in below with your new password.
recovery.errorEmail: Enter the email address associated with your account.
recovery.errorCodeMissing: Enter the verification code from your message.
recovery.errorCodeInvalid: This code is not valid or has expired. Request a new recovery from the previous step.
recovery.errorCodeVerify: We could not verify that code. Try again or request a new one.
recovery.errorPwdShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
recovery.errorPwdMatch: The passwords you entered do not match.
recovery.errorPwdUpdate: Your password could not be updated.

guidance.trustNote: Citizen One is an access layer: it interprets the profile and signals you provide, ranks published programmes by fit and impact signals, and surfaces deadlines and checklists. Official issuers decide eligibility and outcomes.
guidance.situationHint: Choose a life context to re-rank recommendations. Clear all to rely on your saved profile alone.
guidance.rankedSubtitle: Ordered using scheme intelligence (scores, impact flags, and known windows where data exists).
guidance.whyRankedHint: Short, rule-based reasons from the same signals as the score—not a generative chat reply.
guidance.empty: No ranked programmes for this view. Expand filters in Benefit discovery or enrich your profile.
guidance.step1Desc: Household, geography, role, and situation chips you opt into—never speculative guessing.
guidance.step2Desc: Rules and metadata from issuer catalogues drive matches—not generic chat replies.
guidance.step3Desc: Checklists, vault gaps, desk routes, and alerts you can execute in the real world.
guidance.footerDesk: Case-specific reviews still flow through staff channels.

progressPage.summaryLead: Programme applications, pursuits, and desk-related work appear together so citizens and officers share a single status narrative.
progressPage.listEmpty: No applications yet. Start from schemes, opportunities, or the service desk.

alertsWorkspace.intro: New opportunities, approaching deadlines, status changes, and desk updates surface here when triggered for your account or role.

dashboardPage.intro: This command centre connects discovery, vault, applications, and desk workflows—so residents act on opportunities while teams clear queues with a shared, auditable record.
dashboardPage.recommendedEmpty: Complete your eligibility profile to improve matches, then open
dashboardPage.tipsBody: Refresh your profile after life changes—matching and alerts improve materially. Voice, language, SMS concepts, and lite mode live under More services → Inclusion.

serviceDesk.pageDescription: Submit enquiries for staff review. Officers see the live queue; decisions notify requesters and appear in activity history.
serviceDesk.subject: Subject
serviceDesk.detailsPlaceholder: Describe what you need. No sensitive identifiers required for this demo.
serviceDesk.orgVisibility: You have visibility into the service queue. Status changes are limited to staff and administrator accounts.
serviceDesk.staffNoteHint: Use the resolution note above when changing application status; the citizen is notified immediately.

billingPage.pageDescription: Essential public services remain on the free tier. Premium and institutional options fund advanced tooling without blocking welfare access.
billingPage.introCard: Welfare discovery, eligibility guidance, and core service requests are available without a paid plan. Upgrades add analytics, advanced recommendations, and organisation features.
billingPage.paymentsBody: When the API has Stripe configured (STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_PRICE_PREMIUM), upgrading opens a hosted checkout session. Webhooks update subscription state in PostgreSQL. Without Stripe, choosing Premium only updates your profile flag for demos. Institutional procurement still requires contracts, SSO, and data residency decisions with your teams.
billingPage.invoiceBody: Invoices appear here after a billing integration is configured. No payment data is stored in this build.

profilePage.pageDescription: Account details and scheme eligibility profile used for intelligent matching.
profilePage.verifyBody: Confirm your email to meet standard account security expectations. In production, a link is sent through your organisation's mail system; in development, check the API server log for the verification URL.
profilePage.emailFixedHint: Email is fixed for this demo environment.
profilePage.schemeIntro: Demographics, location, and household data drive eligibility scoring and document gap analysis on Benefit Discovery.
profilePage.sessionSecurityNote: Session security enabled · activity logs retained for audit and user safety.
